title: Deploy unified Fastify+RR7 server to Cloud Run staging
acceptance_criteria: Unified Fastify+RR7 server (server/production.ts) is deployed to Cloud Run staging (adjudiclaims-api)
Cloud Run service returns healthy /api/health response
cloudbuild.yaml (or a staging-specific trigger config) deploys from main branch to staging environment
Docker image builds successfully with @adjudica/document-classifier stub
All CI checks pass before deployment
Staging service URL is accessible and returns React Router frontend for non-API routes
GCP project is adjudica-internal (per cloudbuild.yaml artifact registry)
